ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversation */,
  "conversation_title" TEXT /* Title or description of the conversation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the conversation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the conversation */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the conversation in seconds */,
  "transcription_file" TEXT /* File path to the transcription file */,
  "audio_file" TEXT /* File path to the audio file */,
  "conversation_type" TEXT /* Type of conversation (e.g., customer support, focus group) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the conversation took place */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Communication channel (e.g., phone, video, chat) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the conversation */,
  "transcription_status" TEXT /* Status of the transcription (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transcription_version" INTEGER /* Version of the transcription file */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Overall sentiment score of the conversation */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label of the conversation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the speaker */,
  "speaker_type" TEXT /* Type of speaker (e.g., customer, agent, moderator) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the speaker */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the speaker */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the speaker */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the speaker belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise or role of the speaker */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the speaker */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken by the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turns" (
  "turn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turn */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation the turn belongs to */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker in the turn */,
  "turn_num" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the turn in the conversation */,
  "turn_start" TEXT /* Start time of the turn in HH:MM:SS.mmm format */,
  "turn_end" TEXT /* End time of the turn in HH:MM:SS.mmm format */,
  "turn_start_msec" INTEGER /* Start time of the turn in milliseconds */,
  "turn_end_msec" INTEGER /* End time of the turn in milliseconds */,
  "number_of_words" INTEGER /* Number of words spoken in the turn */,
  "transcription" TEXT /* Transcription of the turn */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the turn */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label of the turn */,
  "speech_rate" REAL /* Speech rate in words per minute */,
  "overlap_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of any overlapping speech */,
  "overlap_with" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker with whom the turn overlaps */,
  "turn_type" TEXT /* Type of turn (e.g., question, answer, statement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turns_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turns_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turn_gaps" (
  "gap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gap */,
  "turn_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turn following the gap */,
  "previous_turn_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turn preceding the gap */,
  "gap_length" INTEGER /* Length of the gap in milliseconds */,
  "gap_start_msec" INTEGER /* Start time of the gap in milliseconds */,
  "gap_end_msec" INTEGER /* End time of the gap in milliseconds */,
  "gap_type" TEXT /* Type of gap (e.g., silence, noise) */,
  "gap_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the gap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turn_gaps_previous_turn_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_turn_id") REFERENCES turns ("turn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turn_gaps_turn_id FOREIGN KEY ("turn_id") REFERENCES turns ("turn_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of specific permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "level" TEXT /* User's level or seniority */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation being accessed */,
  "turn_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turn being accessed (if applicable) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_turn_id FOREIGN KEY ("turn_id") REFERENCES turns ("turn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id")
)
